title: Itsmooth
body:
This is **Itsmooth**!\
In this pack, all(most) all textures are 8px by 8px. This is half of the usual 16px by 16px.

Fun fact: Itsmooth is a **Simplistic** texture pack, and may even improve game performace, although this isn't a guarantee. 

Check out my YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/c/Itsme64 \
Trailer Video: https://youtu.be/jAcR6uSRuTo  

**MESSAGE ON 28/02/25:** Itsmooth is NOT yet 100% completed, although I'm working very hard to bring this pack to full completion as soon as possible :))
As of 28/02/25 this pack is **recontinued** *yay\*

\
Although you might not expect it from a simple Minecraft Texture Pack, but this pack actually has a very interesting back story: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1pFeDtRp6Hw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This pack also exists for Minecraft Bedrock Edition: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/itsmooth 

Do you often work with texture packs? Check out my texture pack conversion website, allowing cross-version texture pack converting (even Bedrock to Java and Java to Bedrock): https://www.convertmcpack.net/
